_comment: Ground-truth corpus for QuickSay transcription regression suite (T2.6). Run fetch-corpus.ps1 to download LibriSpeech audio and populate expected_text for clean/accents buckets. Edge cases are fully specified here. Every entry has a source + license — these are third-party assets.

clips.expected_text: he hoped there would be stew for dinner turnips and carrots and bruised potatoes and fat mutton pieces to be ladled out in thick peppered flour fattened sauce
clips.source: LibriSpeech test-clean speaker 1089 chapter 134686 utterance 0000 (librivox public domain)

clips.expected_text: stuff it into you his belly counselled him
after early nightfall the yellow lamps would light up here and there the squalid quarter of the brothels
hello bertie any good in your mind
number ten fresh nelly is waiting on you good night husband
the music came nearer and he recalled the words the words of shelley's fragment upon the moon wandering companionless pale for weariness
the dull light fell more faintly upon the page whereon another equation began to unfold itself slowly and to spread abroad its widening tail
a cold lucid indifference reigned in his soul
the chaos in which his ardour extinguished itself was a cold indifferent knowledge of himself
at most by an alms given to a beggar whose blessing he fled from he might hope wearily to win for himself some measure of actual grace

how strange it seemed to the sad woman as she watched the growth and the beauty that became every day more brilliant and the intelligence that threw its quivering sunshine over the tiny features of this child
clips.source: LibriSpeech test-clean speaker 1221 chapter 135766 utterance 0000 (diverse speaker set)

clips.expected_text: god as a direct consequence of the sin which man thus punished had given her a lovely child whose place was on that same dishonoured bosom to connect her parent for ever with the race and descent of mortals and to be finally a blessed soul in heaven
yet these thoughts affected hester prynne less with hope than apprehension

but already at a point in economic evolution far antedating the emergence of the lady specialised consumption of goods as an evidence of pecuniary strength had begun to work out in a more or less elaborate system
clips.source: LibriSpeech test-clean speaker 3570 chapter 5694 utterance 0000 (diverse speaker set)

clips.expected_text: the utility of consumption as an evidence of wealth is to be classed as a derivative growth

clips.source: FFmpeg anoisesrc synthetic 3s mono white noise

clips._note: T1.1 finding 015: IsWhisperHallucination() flags single-word output as a false positive. This test asserts Whisper DOES return the word (actual_raw correct) — it is the app filter that incorrectly drops it. actual_kept will be empty; that is the KNOWN BUG, not a test failure.
